benchmark_contract.bfcl_version: BFCL V4 partial evaluation with official deterministic scorer
benchmark_contract.runtime_failure_policy: Context exhaustion, request limits, protocol failures, and QNN/device initialization failures are recorded separately; none can pass.

platform_gaps.reason: Qwen3.5 hybrid GatedDeltaNet/linear-attention state is unsupported by the QAI Hub Models 0.56 plain-Qwen3 exporter and current Genie/QNN path.
Available context binary targets Hexagon v79; IQ9075 exposes Hexagon v73.

gguf_cpu_thread_scaling.conclusion: GGUF is not single-core; use a native ARM build with -t 8 -tb 8 on this EVK.

deployments.tool_renderer_parser: qwen3_xml tool parser + qwen3 reasoning parser

deployments.caveat: Valid on-device CPU fallback; current QAI/QNN path lacks Qwen3.5 GatedDeltaNet support.
QAI Hub generated bundle defaults; OpenAI client temperature is not applied by the bridge.
